core_principles: Density is Information: Don't hide data, structure it beautifully.
Motion is Feedback: Animations should feel like mechanical switches, not floaty clouds.

typography.installation_instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap');

usage_rules: Never use solid backgrounds for cards; use #0A0A0A with a 1px border (#27272A).
Green (#00FF94) is ONLY for positive P&L and 'Buy' signals.
Red (#FF3B30) is ONLY for negative P&L and 'Sell' signals.
Purple (#7000FF) is reserved EXCLUSIVELY for AI Analysis/Insights.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm h-10 px-4 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border hover:bg-secondary/50 text-secondary-foreground rounded-sm h-10 px-4 text-xs
buttons.trade_buy: bg-[#00FF94] text-black hover:bg-[#00CC76] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.trade_sell: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#CC2F26] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

inputs.default: bg-[#121212] border-border/50 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-10 text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

badges.sector: border border-border bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

effects.scanline: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); background-size: 100% 4px;
effects.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

images.description: Abstract dark wavy lines for login/hero background
Neon blue line chart for AI analysis section empty state

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #A1A1AA text on #050505 background meets 4.5:1. If not, lighten text to #D4D4D8.
accessibility.interactive_elements: All buttons must have :focus-visible outlines (ring-2 ring-primary).
accessibility.screen_readers: Use aria-label on icon-only buttons (e.g., 'Approve Trade').

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new color palette extension.
Create a 'Layout' component that applies the sidebar + header structure globally.
For the 'Sector-wise Stock Bucket', use a masonry or dense grid layout, not a simple list.
The 'AI Research Panel' should feel like a distinct 'app-within-an-app' using the purple accent color.
Use Recharts for the Portfolio P&L chart (AreaChart with gradient fill).
Implement the 'Approve/Reject' workflow with 'Sonner' toast notifications for feedback.
